title: Set a unique ID API

posts.author: DanielSoderlund (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have built a flow in Postman to create items in a group.
They are unique events from another system and I’m looking for a way not getting duplicated items. I seen the unique ID column but it’s generated by Monday.

My idea was if the external event ID exist in a column the API call would fail and the for loop could continue with the next item.

This is the place to share thoughts, questions and ideas about apps and integrations! N.B. this is not the place to ask questions about building apps - please ask such questions in the monday Apps & Developers category!
